questionHtml:
What is the molecular formula of a hydrocarbon containing 84.6% carbon by mass with a molar mass of 142.3 g mol−1?

A.     C20H44

B.     C11H10

C.     C10H22

D.     C5H11

meta.title: What is the molecular formula of a hydrocarbon containing 84.6% carbon by mass with a molar mass of 142.3 g mol−1? A. C20H44 B. C11H10 C. C10H22 D. C5H11
